output.summary: Depth-recurrent 11-layer GPT layers reuse BlockCores while using partial RoPE/value embeddings and legal score-first 30-epoch SGD TTT with frozen early layers.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first legal test-time training runs SGD solely on validation chunks after scoring, so adaptation occurs entirely at evaluation time.
techniques: SGD+momentum 30-epoch per 32K chunk TTT with freeze=2
Depth recurrence with shared BlockCores plus Partial RoPE and value embeddings
Score-first legal evaluation enforced via torch.inference_mode
